sourceRef.citation: Annual Methodological Archive Research Review et al. 2026

statement.en: Phytochemical Screening of Selected Cholistani Plants and Their Biological Activities by In-Vitro Assays

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom describes a methodological research archive (2026-dated preprint) on phytochemical screening. Classification is FLOWING because: (1) empirical results from in-vitro assays are provisional until peer review and replication; (2) phytochemical compound identification and bioactivity claims require validation across independent labs; (3) the 2026 date indicates this is either future-projected or not yet established in canonical literature; (4) in-vitro findings do not automatically translate to in-vivo or clinical validity.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 砂漠の植物たちが秘める化学の言語は、活性という数値へ還元される。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 試験管の中で、植物の魂が四方八方へ活性の光を放つ。
